overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a snowy Nordic forest at night under the aurora borealis. The perspective transitions from first-person to third-person follow as a warrior character joins two companions and walks through the deep snow-covered woodland path.

agents.ego_description: walking alone through deep snow on a forest path in first-person perspective

entered.detail: deep snow with visible footprints and trail marks
tall snow-covered evergreen trees lining the path
tall snow-covered evergreen trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: A solitary first-person walk through a quiet snowy forest at night. The path winds between snow-laden pine trees and rocks, with deep snow covering the ground and bushes lining the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest path under aurora borealis

events.description: camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person follow behind a warrior character
two companion warriors carrying round shields join and walk alongside the main character
camera tilts upward to reveal the aurora borealis shimmering in the night sky

agents.ego_description: warrior walking with two companions through the snowy forest, following the winding path

notable_agents.action: companion warrior with round shield walking alongside the group
companion warrior with round shield walking alongside the group

entered.detail: green and blue northern lights shimmering across the night sky
distant snow-covered mountain slopes visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person follow as the warrior joins two shield-bearing companions walking through the snowy woodland. The group proceeds along the trail while the camera occasionally tilts up to reveal the aurora borealis dancing above the snow-covered pines and distant hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement through a silent, snowy Nordic forest that transitions from a solitary first-person perspective into a third-person journey with companions. It begins as a lonely walk along a winding trail, moving between snow-laden pine trees and frost-covered rocks. As the camera pulls back to reveal a warrior joining two shield-bearing companions, the perspective shifts to a follow-shot that tracks the group's progress through the deep woodland. The scene then expands upward, with the camera tilting toward the night sky to reveal the aurora borealis dancing above the pines and distant hills. Finally, the group continues their steady march along the snowy path under the shimmering celestial lights.
